summary: 13 film announcements, 7 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Grace
film.announcement: Millicent Simmonds to co-write and star in crime thriller for Inevitable Studios' first film.

film.title: Egg Baby
film.announcement: Amazon MGM acquires rom-com starring Ariana Greenblatt.

film.title: Mickey's Home Alone
film.announcement: Disney taps into the spirit of Macaulay Culkin-starring classic for Mickey's Home Alone Christmas special.

film.title: Thud
film.talent: Sarah Michelle Gellar, Rudy Pankow, Mali Elfman (director)
film.announcement: Sarah Michelle Gellar and Rudy Pankow cast as Grim Reaper and The Devil in Mali Elfman film with Divide/Conquer and Radio Silence as executive producers.

film.title: Monsanto Courtroom Drama (Untitled)
film.talent: Jonathan Bailey, Laura Dern, Lakeith Stanfield, Greg Kinnear, John Lee Hancock (director)
film.announcement: John Lee Hancock's Netflix courtroom drama on 2018 Monsanto case adds six cast members joining Jonathan Bailey and Laura Dern.

film.title: Shots! Shots! Shots!
film.announcement: Amazon MGM picks up Jason Momoa action comedy.

film.title: Black Diamond
film.announcement: Comic adaptation to be adapted into folk horror feature with Ernest Dickerson directing.

film.title: Untitled Bradley Cooper/Sean Penn Jan. 6 Film
film.announcement: Bradley Cooper to star as cop who ends up at Jan. 6 in Sean Penn-directed Warner Bros. film.

film.title: Narnia
film.announcement: Sony Pictures to distribute Greta Gerwig and Netflix's Narnia internationally in theaters.

film.title: Corpus
film.announcement: Yellow Veil Pictures boards NYC nightlife thriller, launching sales before Fantasia premiere.

film.title: Hexed
film.announcement: Disney releases first teaser for witch-filled animated film.

film.title: The Rocky Horror Picture Show
film.announcement: The Rocky Horror Picture Show sets 2027 run at Sphere Las Vegas as follow-up to Wizard of Oz.

film.title: I Am Frankelda
film.announcement: Stop-motion animation film on Netflix with filmmakers discussing the medium's relevance against AI.

tv.title: The Audacity
tv.announcement: Miriam Shor joins AMC's The Audacity for Season 2.

tv.title: The Reluctant Traveler With Eugene Levy
tv.announcement: Series renewed for Season 4 at Apple TV+.

tv.title: Dirty
tv.talent: Samantha Morton, Phoebe Dynevor, Matt Charman (writer/creator)
tv.announcement: Samantha Morton and Phoebe Dynevor to star in Matt Charman's Amazon drama series.

tv.title: Count My Lies
tv.announcement: François Arnaud joins Hulu series Count My Lies.

tv.title: My Adventures With Superman: Green Lantern
tv.announcement: Auliʻi Cravalho to star as Green Lantern in My Adventures With Superman spinoff.

tv.title: Heartstopper Forever
tv.announcement: Netflix releases trailer for Heartstopper finale as feature film with Nick and Charlie preparing for long distance.

tv.title: Louis C.K. Netflix Special
tv.announcement: Louis C.K.'s new Netflix special sets June release date.
